name: Butter Mints, Willena Shiflett
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Stir in the Karo syrup until fully blended.
3. Pour over the confectioner's sugar and work into a dough.
4. Flavor and color as desired.
5. Shape the dough into balls.
6. Press each ball onto granulated sugar, pressing firmly on one side only.
7. Turn the mints out immediately.
8. Allow to air dry for 8-12 hours before storing in the freezer.
